title: Marriage (Prohibited Degrees) Act
description: Marriage (Prohibited Degrees) Act (Marriage (Prohibited Degrees) Act). Current to 2026-02-04.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 1 This Act may be cited as the Marriage (Prohibited Degrees) Act .

provisions.title: No prohibition
provisions.content: 2 (1) Subject to subsection (2), persons related by consanguinity, affinity or adoption are not prohibited from marrying each other by reason only of their relationship. (2) No person shall marry another person if they are related lineally, or as brother or sister or half-brother or half-sister, including by adoption. Previous Version

provisions.title: Marriage not invalid
provisions.content: 3 (1) Subject to subsection (2), a marriage between persons related by consanguinity, affinity or adoption is not invalid by reason only of their relationship. (2) A marriage between persons who are related in the manner described in subsection 2(2) is void. Previous Version

provisions.title: Complete code
provisions.content: 4 This Act contains all of the prohibitions in law in Canada against marriage by reason of the parties being related.

provisions.title: Commencement
provisions.content: 6 This Act shall come into force on the day that is one year after the day it is assented to, or on such earlier day in any province as may be fixed by order of the Governor in Council at the request of that province.
